name: Section: map
variants: abstract DE-CH SVG w/ animated nodes (ruerup)
visual: Decorative line-map (abstract CH/DE-CH SVG or a custom city street map) with animated location nodes/labels — coverage made tangible.
placement: Inside the contact block or as a standalone coverage section for multi-location firms.
animation: Location nodes pulse/ping continuously; routes draw on reveal; tooltip fades on node hover.
realWorld: Nexova: interactive CH map, 8 cities (Bern, Basel, Zürich, …)
Rürup: abstract DE-CH SVG with animated nodes

designLanguage.warm: Hand-built Zürich street lines on paper.
